title: Create Aeronautics: Placeable Wheels
description: Addon for Create Aeronautics that makes its Tire items placeable as blocks.
body:
This lightweight mod makes all four Tires from Create Aeronautics (the Offroad part of it to be more precise) placeable as normal blocks (instead of just normal items) so you can use them as decoration (in addition to their standard behavior).

Requires [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) (and it's dependencies obviously).
